books.title: The Word Made Fresh
books.author: Abram Van Engen
books.rationale: Van Engen lays out a beautiful relational approach to poetry which resonates deeply with Mason. As he models a love for poetry and gives insights into how to enjoy, understand, and read poetry (or start on the journey!), students will continue growing their own delight. Lesson plans pair readings from the book with practical exercises.
books.sharedText:
Poetry Study: Grade 10
Poetry Study: Grade 11

books.title: Poetry Anthology
books.author: Various
books.rationale: Students use a poetry anthology of their choice (in print or online) for the exercises accompanying readings in The Word Made Fresh. Suggestions are listed in Extra Helpings for the course, but any anthology with a wide variety of poems and poets is sufficient.
